summary: Tested viewport-based sign culling implementation (P1) and verified all existing features. Backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend UI all working correctly. Navigation view loads with map, search bar, sidebar, and map controls. Map pan/zoom interactions work without errors. Community view shows category stats, live feed, report submission form. ELD Logs, Offline Maps, and Display views all render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Viewport-based sign culling implemented correctly in NavigationView.tsx
VERIFIED: signDataStoreRef and visibleSignMarkersRef refs created for viewport culling (lines 327-328)
VERIFIED: syncVisibleSigns function handles viewport culling with 20% padding (lines 1310-1354)
VERIFIED: registerSign() helper used by placeHighwayShields, placeExitSigns, placeCurveSigns, placeSpeedLimitSigns
VERIFIED: Navigation view loads with Leaflet map, search bar, weather widget, map controls
VERIFIED: Map pan and zoom interactions work without errors
VERIFIED: All sidebar items present: Dashboard, Navigation, Load Board, Truck Stops, Pay Summary, Maintenance, History, Fuel Network, Community, ELD Logs, Offline Maps, Display, Settings
VERIFIED: Community view (data-testid='community-view') renders with category stats (4 Parking, 1 Fuel Price, 1 Weigh Station, 3 Road Hazard)
VERIFIED: Community filter buttons found for all 5 categories: parking, fuel_price, weigh_station, hazard, road_condition
VERIFIED: Community submit button (data-testid='community-submit-btn') opens submit form
VERIFIED: Community submit form has title, location, description inputs and category selection
VERIFIED: Community live feed shows 9 reports with upvote buttons
VERIFIED: Backend API: GET /api/community/reports returns reports array (9 reports)
VERIFIED: Backend API: POST /api/community/reports creates new report
VERIFIED: Backend API: POST /api/crash-prediction with bbox returns incident analysis
VERIFIED: ELD Logs view (data-testid='eld-log-view') renders with daily log graph, status buttons
VERIFIED: Offline Maps view (data-testid='offline-maps-view') shows 5 download regions with tile estimates
VERIFIED: Display (HUD Layout) view renders with 23 toggle switches for UI customization

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Viewport-based sign culling (P1) implemented and verified. The key change is: placement functions (placeHighwayShields, placeExitSigns, placeCurveSigns, placeSpeedLimitSigns) now call registerSign() instead of directly adding L.marker to the map. syncVisibleSigns() then renders only signs within the padded viewport bounds (20% padding). Signs are added/removed on map moveend/zoomend events. All 15 backend API tests passed. All sidebar views verified working. Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com
